Container.Name: ckpool-solo
Container.Overview:
Self-hosted Bitcoin solo mining stratum server for Unraid.
Runs ckpool in BTCSOLO mode (-B flag), built from the official Con Kolivas source. Point your ASICs at this server and it relays work from your local Bitcoin Core node. 100% of any block reward goes directly to your configured Bitcoin address — no pool, no fees, no middleman.
Requires a fully synced Bitcoin Core node with RPC enabled, reachable from this container. Configure RPC credentials and your Bitcoin address in ckpool.conf before starting.
Stratum endpoint: stratum+tcp://[your-unraid-ip]:3333 Miner username: your Bitcoin address Miner password: anything
Template repository: https://github.com/bitcryptic-gw/unraid-ckpool-solo Docker Hub: https://hub.docker.com/r/bitcryptic/ckpool-solo
Container.Requires: Bitcoin Core node with RPC enabled on the same Docker network or LAN.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Path to ckpool.conf and runtime data. Must contain a valid ckpool.conf before starting.

Config.Name: Stratum Port
Config.Description: Stratum port for miners to connect to. Point your ASICs at stratum+tcp://[unraid-ip]:3333
